top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks Concentration Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The issue was inconsistent methods for evaluating sovereign risk exposure. RBI mandated use of ECGC country risk classifications for uniform concentration risk management.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Third Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI amended capital adequacy norms to align with updated provisioning standards. The changes clarify inclusion and exclusion of provisions in Tier 2 capital.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks Credit Facilities) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI clarified that project finance accounts may be classified as NPAs even before operations begin. The decision promotes early detection of stress based on recovery performance.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks Credit Risk Management) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: Banks can temporarily rely on ECGC country classifications until internal systems are developed. The ruling ensures continuity while promoting gradual transition to advanced risk assessment models.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Capital Charge for Credit Risk – Standardised Approach) Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The Directions introduce a structured framework for calculating risk-weighted assets under Basel III norms.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Repeal Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The issue concerns replacement of earlier RBI Directions on asset classification and provisioning. The key takeaway is that the new framework applies prospectively while preserving past actions under...

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks — Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)- Seventh Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI mandates separate disclosure of provisions and detailed credit quality reporting. The ruling improves transparency and aligns financial statements with updated provisioning norms.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Asset Liability Management) – Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The amendment updates loan classification references under ALM Directions. The key takeaway is that banks must follow the 2026 IRACP framework for classification from April 2027.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks — Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) – Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI mandates that penal charges apply only after a three-day delay and only on outstanding dues. The ruling protects customers from excessive penalties and ensures fair billing practices.

top_articles.title: RBI (Urban Cooperative Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets)- Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The amendment revises the definition of financial difficulty for urban cooperative banks. The key takeaway is uniform interpretation across banking segments for resolving stressed assets.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) – Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI introduced a timeline for declaring wilful defaulters after NPA classification. It ensures faster identification and strengthens credit discipline.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets) Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The amendment addresses inconsistencies in asset classification and provisioning norms. RBI aligned stressed asset resolution rules with the 2026 provisioning directions for uniform treatment.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Second Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The issue was limited access to financing for rural enterprises. RBI added AgriSURE, enabling commercial banks to support agri startups and boost financial inclusion.

top_articles.title: RBI (Urban Co-operative Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The issue was limited financing options for rural enterprises. RBI added AgriSURE, enabling UCBs to support agri startups and strengthen inclusive growth.

top_articles.title: RBI (Local Area Banks – Miscellaneous) – Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The update addressed expanding financing support for rural enterprises. RBI included AgriSURE in its Directions, encouraging banks to fund agri-startups and rural innovation.

top_articles.title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: RBI revised credit risk transfer rules to align with updated asset classification norms. The amendment ensures consistent recognition, provisioning, and disclosure of acquired loans.

top_articles.summary: The Karnataka High Court set aside a Rule 86A action taken against an assessee, ruling that the provision applies only when the assessee fraudulently avails Input Tax Credit (ITC).

top_articles.title: RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies– Undertaking of Financial Services) –Amendment Directions, 2026
top_articles.summary: The issue was whether NBFCs could expand into agri-startup financing. RBI amended the rules to include AgriSURE, enabling NBFCs to support rural enterprises and boost financial inclusion.

top_articles.summary: The amendment revises classification, valuation, and provisioning rules for bank investments. The key takeaway is that investment norms now follow a unified framework based on ECL and credit risk...
